languages.text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (minimum 0) check. They fall prone on fail and consider wearer priority target on success. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

traits.locale_text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (minimum 0) check. They fall prone on fail and consider wearer priority target on success. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

languages.text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}priority target{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.
languages.original_text: When moving in combat leave trail of oiled ground for 2 rounds. Enemies, entering oiled ground must pass a AGI +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (minimum 0) check. They fall prone on fail and consider wearer priority target on success. Oiled ground is consumed upon use.

traits.locale_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area consisting of all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} bonus (minimum 0). On a failed test, that enemy falls prone. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's priority target. After, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area consisting of all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 rounds.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} bonus (minimum 0). On a failed test, that enemy falls prone. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's priority target. After, the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}priority target{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

When an enemy enters it, they must pass an Agility resistance test with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} bonus (minimum 0). On a failed test, that enemy falls prone. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's priority target. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}priority target{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

languages.text:
Во время перемещения в бою обладатель аугмента оставляет за собой масляную область во всех клетках, через которые проходит. Эта область существует 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (минимум 0). При провале {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверки{/g} противник оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинут{/g}. При успехе обладатель аугмента становится {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}приоритетной целью{/g} этого противника. Затем масло исчезает из клетки.

When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}priority target{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (минимум 0). Во время перемещения в бою обладатель аугмента оставляет за собой масляную область во всех клетках, через которые проходит. Эта область существует 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}раунда{/g}.
Когда противник перемещается в нее, он проходит проверку {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Ловкости{/g} на{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}сопротивление{/g} с {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}бонусом{/g} +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (минимум 0). При провале {g|Encyclopedia:Test}проверки{/g} противник оказывается {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}опрокинут{/g}. При успехе обладатель аугмента становится {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}приоритетной целью{/g} этого противника. Затем масло исчезает из клетки.

languages.text:
Cuando se mueve en combate, el usuario crea una zona cubierta de aceite en todas las casillas que recorre. Esta zona dura 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}asaltos{/g}.
Cuando un enemigo entra en ella, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} con una {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificación{/g} de +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (mínimo 0). Si falla esta {g|Encyclopedia:Test}prueba{/g}, el enemigo es {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}derribado{/g}. Si supera la prueba, el usuario se convierte en el {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}objetivo prioritario{/g} de ese enemigo. Luego el aceite desaparece de esa casilla.

When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). Cuando un enemigo entra en ella, debe superar una {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}prueba de fortaleza{/g} de {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilidad{/g} con una {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonificación{/g} de +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (mínimo 0). languages.text: Während er sich im Kampf bewegt, erzeugt der Nutzer einen Ölfilm auf allen Feldern, die er passiert. Der Bereich bleibt 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang bestehen.Betritt ihn ein Gegner, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Bonus{/g} von +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} bestehen (min. 0). Misslingt die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g}, fällt der Gegner {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} zu Boden. Gelingt die Probe, wird der Nutzer das {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}Prioritätsziel{/g} dieses Gegners. Danach wird das Feld vom Öl befreit.

On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. Der Bereich bleibt 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}Runden{/g} lang bestehen.Betritt ihn ein Gegner, muss er eine {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}Widerstandsprobe{/g} auf {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Beweglichkeit{/g} mit einem {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}Bonus{/g} von +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} bestehen (min. 0). Misslingt die {g|Encyclopedia:Test}Probe{/g}, fällt der Gegner {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}hingestreckt{/g} zu Boden. Gelingt die Probe, wird der Nutzer das {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}Prioritätsziel{/g} dieses Gegners. Danach wird das Feld vom Öl befreit.

languages.text:
Kullanıcı, çatışmada hareket ederken geçtiği tüm hücrelerde yağla kaplı bir alan oluşturur. Bu alan, 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalır.
Bir düşman bu alana girdiğinde +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonusa{/g} (minimum 0) sahip bir {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Çeviklik{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}direnç testinden{/g} geçmelidir. Düşman, testte başarısız olursa {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilir{/g}. Başarılı olursa kullanıcı, o düşmanın {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}öncelikli hedefi{/g} hâline gelir. Ardından o hücredeki yağ ortadan kalkar.

During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}priority target{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

Kullanıcı, çatışmada hareket ederken geçtiği tüm hücrelerde yağla kaplı bir alan oluşturur. Bu alan, 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}raunt{/g} boyunca kalır.

Düşman, testte başarısız olursa {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}yere devrilir{/g}. Başarılı olursa kullanıcı, o düşmanın {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}öncelikli hedefi{/g} hâline gelir. Ardından o hücredeki yağ ortadan kalkar.

languages.text:
Lorsqu'il se déplace en situation de combat, l'utilisateur laisse sur toutes les cases qu'il traverse une nappe d'huile qui dure 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
Lorsqu'un ennemi pénètre dans la zone, il doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} avec un {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (minimum 0). En cas d'échec, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Test}{/g}. En cas de réussite, l'utilisateur devient sa {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}cible prioritaire{/g}, après quoi l'huile disparaît de la case sur laquelle il se trouve.
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}priority target{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

Lorsqu'il se déplace en situation de combat, l'utilisateur laisse sur toutes les cases qu'il traverse une nappe d'huile qui dure 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
Lorsqu'un ennemi pénètre dans la zone, il doit réussir un {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}test de résistance{/g} d'{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agilité{/g} avec un {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} de +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} (minimum 0). En cas d'échec, il subit l'effet {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}Paralysie{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:Test}{/g}. En cas de réussite, l'utilisateur devient sa {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}cible prioritaire{/g}, après quoi l'huile disparaît de la case sur laquelle il se trouve.

languages.text:
在战斗中移动时，使用者在其经过的所有格子里创造一片覆油区域。该区域持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
敌人进入覆油区域时，必须通过一项有{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}（最低为0）的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}失败，该敌人陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}状态。若检定成功，使用者成为该敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}优先目标{/g}，随后清除该格的油污。
languages.original_text:
During movement in combat, the user creates an oil-covered area in all cells they move through. This area lasts for 2 {g|Encyclopedia:Round}rounds{/g}.
When an enemy enters it, they must pass an {g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}Agility{/g} {g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}resistance test{/g} with a +{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49} {g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}bonus{/g} (minimum 0). On a failed {g|Encyclopedia:Test}test{/g}, that enemy falls {g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}prone{/g}. On a successful test, the user becomes that enemy's {g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}priority target{/g}. Then the oil is removed from the cell.

traits.locale_text:
在战斗中移动时，使用者在其经过的所有格子里创造一片覆油区域。该区域持续2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}轮{/g}。
敌人进入覆油区域时，必须通过一项有{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49}{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}加值{/g}（最低为0）的{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抗性检定{/g}。若{g|Encyclopedia:Test}检定{/g}失败，该敌人陷入{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}倒地{/g}状态。若检定成功，使用者成为该敌人的{g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}优先目标{/g}，随后清除该格的油污。

languages.text:
戦闘中の移動時、使用者は通過したすべてのマスに油まみれの領域を生成する。この領域は2{g|Encyclopedia:Round}ラウンド{/g}持続する。
敵がそこに入ると、+{uip|DC|2b385735a44746e0b2fbaa2b68ef0b49}の{g|Encyclopedia:Bonus}ボーナス{/g}（最低0）を伴う{g|Encyclopedia:WarhammerAgility}敏捷{/g}{g|Encyclopedia:ResistanceTest}抵抗判定{/g}を行わなければならない。{g|Encyclopedia:Test}判定{/g}に失敗すると、その敵は{g|Encyclopedia:ProneEffect}伏せ状態{/g}になる。判定に成功すると、使用者はその敵の{g|Encyclopedia:PriorityTarget}優先目標{/g}になる。その後、そのマスから油が除去される。
